metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Coshine EastPay APIs — AI-assisted integration skills for card issuing, payment gateway, and related services.

plugins.name: coshine-card-issuing
plugins.description: EastPay card-issuing integration — 4 language-agnostic AI skills: main router, authentication (Bearer + timestamp), 3-step MVP quickstart (CardApplication → CustomerCardInfoInquiry → CardActivation), and a reference knowledge base (public headers, data dictionary, error codes, endpoints catalog, sample JSON).
